public_evidence: UNITI terminal-ileum expression row includes UNITI-2/IM-UNITI baseline/week 8/week 44 material; existing source check found shared UNITI family and overlap with DS107 public CNTO1275CRD3002 subject IDs.
overlap_result: Shares 115 public UNITI subject IDs with DS107, but tissue/timepoint/sample sets are not exact duplicates and neither row cleanly contains the other.
recommended_action: Keep current values. This is a policy/manual-review decision for unique-participant cohort counting versus tissue/timepoint accession counting, not a public-evidence-resolved TRUE/FALSE change.
risk_note: Setting both TRUE risks double-counting up to 115 UNITI subjects; forcing either FALSE/component risks hiding valid tissue/timepoint-specific data and implying duplicate samples.
